caption: A person's hands are shown interacting with a black "OBSIDIAN" branded trading card box. The individual uses their fingers to carefully remove a card from within the packaging. The box features a green and red design with an athlete's image on the cover. In the background, a smaller picture-in-picture window reveals a man with short hair wearing a black shirt, sitting in a room with shelves behind him. On-screen text displays the logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" in white and red letters. As the sequence progresses, the hands move across the box, sliding a card out of its slot. The man in the inset window remains stationary, watching the process. The lighting is bright, focused on the box and the hands performing the action.
